{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323161741A50B561352BE41F5FA4F"}"},"total":109},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611097039826944830","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书很有趣，里面有很多梗，聚焦了一些天家的故事，中期会有部分剧情跟西游记重叠，西游结束后会有新的剧情，希望大家看看，十分感谢，可以的话，给我的书打打分，新人作者很难，感谢大家了[哭][哭][哭][哭][哭]","text_exts":[{"e":37,"s":34,"text":"西游记","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A5%BF%E6%B8%B8%E8%AE%B0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177425386141F5FA4F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227611097039826944830%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227578418633513126937%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A5%BF%E6%B8%B8%E8%AE%B0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772099210,"group_id":"7578418633513126937","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个疯癫的小说写手~~","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6uhaISX/GsEp6GFNRT07J0=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9348464d559148359148a1e3535bd13c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796991&x-signature=6BSm%2FilgIgLTu5oyDfSWmHdj86A%3D","user_id":"6029385206","user_name":"落君宇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"6029385206","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_3","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.3","title_id":"author_level_3"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.3","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.3"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7578418633513126937","book_info":{"abstract":"【三界的名义+天庭官场+人情世故+洪荒+西游+天庭店小二】
评分刚出，会涨的！
封神结束，众神归位
钟成虽然修为不行，为雷部天君姚斌的弟子，好歹也算混上了天官。
嗯？什么，有香火就能变强？
我修炼确实不行，但敛香，咱强项啊！
“恩师，往后进出下界的货物，每一次都有您一成干股，现在刚刚开始，也就几个亿的香火，您千万别嫌少啊……”
姚斌:不少了，不少了！
“太师，这也没办法，还有一些天王、元帅，天尊啥的，上上下下都需要打点，以后会越来越多的！”
闻仲:你这孩子！香要一点点赚！
“星君，我给您弄了一套九品莲台，就如来佛祖的同款，也不知道合不合适……”
太白:不合适，不合适，你帮我查一下这个莲台值多少香…
杨戬:钟成，你这个植物不一样，权利大，我都听说了，给你个天尊都不换！
“真君，这我可要批评您了，不管植物大小，都是为三界服务！”
如来:钟施主，我这有一个项目，不知道你有没有兴趣。
